name: Columbia Sportswear Company
description: Columbia Sportswear Company is a leading global innovator in active outdoor apparel, footwear, accessories, and equipment. Founded in 1938 in Portland, Oregon, the company has developed a reputation for quality, performance, and innovation. Columbia designs, sources, markets, and distributes outdoor and active lifestyle products under several brands, including Columbia, SOREL, Mountain Hardwear, and prAna. Its products are sold in approximately 90 countries through wholesale distribution channels, company-owned retail stores, and e-commerce websites, catering to outdoor enthusiasts worldwide.
